data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_WantYouToHaveSil:
Gorge your eyes on this!\pIt's a SILK SCARF. It's right at the
cutting edge of fashion, yeah!\pOh, I can see your eyes twinkling!
You appreciate my dazzling style!\pOh, you're a delight!
Here you go. I want you to have it!
data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_NoRoom: Oh, you don't have room?\pNow, listen tight, this SCARF is a must-\nhave! Why, I would sell all my items\lin order to get it!
data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_ExplainSilkScarf: The SILK SCARF raises the power of\nNORMAL-type moves.\pIt's a marvelous SCARF that will go\nwith almost all POKéMON!
data/maps/DewfordTown_House2/text.inc.DewfordTown_House2_Text_BrawlySoCool:
Wow, you bothered to cross the sea
to visit DEWFORD?\pDid you maybe come here because you
heard about BRAWLY?\pHe's so cool...
Everyone idolizes him.
